title: Horizons Middle East & Africa 06/12/2026 (Video)
title_cn: 中东和非洲地平线 06/12/2026（视频）

title: Banks Curb Hedge Fund Bets on SK Hynix, Samsung After Rally
title_cn: 反弹后银行限制对冲基金押注 SK 海力士和三星
summary: Global banks are curbing hedge funds’ leveraged bets on Asia’s top chipmakers including SK Hynix Inc. and Samsung Electronics Co. after a blistering rally this year raised concerns of a potential pullback, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Central Banks Face Growing Pressures: Markets Snapshot
title_cn: 央行面临越来越大的压力：市场概况
summary:
Central banks are staring down a pivotal moment for global monetary policy as they grapple with a growing list of risks. Incoming Fed Chair, Kevin Warsh will need to find a way to navigate the central bank’s policy path amidst a combination of higher energy prices and a surprisingly strong US jobs report. Meanwhile in Europe, the ECB and BOE face the prospect of secondary effects due to the war in Iran and a sluggish growth outlook. The Opening Trade spoke to key voices around the challenges facing central banks and the judgment behind the decisions.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: FanDuel Owner Flutter to Delist From London After Shift to US
title_cn: FanDuel 所有者 Flut 将在转移到美国后从伦敦退市
summary: Flutter Entertainment Plc announced it plans to delist from the London Stock Exchange about two years after the online betting group shifted its primary listing to New York, as part of a wave of international companies that moved their main trading stateside.

title: UK Lags Rivals in Curbing Influx of Cheap Parcels From China
title_cn: 英国在遏制来自中国的廉价包裹涌入方面落后于竞争对手
summary: More cheap parcels exported from China are flowing into the UK than rival European economies, undermining British retailers that want the government to accelerate a promised crackdown.

title: SpaceX IPO in Focus as Iran Fears Ease | The Asia Trade 6/12/2026
title_cn: 伊朗担忧情绪缓解，SpaceX 首次公开募股成为焦点亚洲贸易 6/12/2026
summary:
"Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" brings you everything you need to know to get ahead as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Declines as Traders Weigh Prospects for US-Iran Peace Deal
title_cn: 交易商权衡美伊和平协议前景，金价下跌
summary: Gold headed for a second weekly decline as traders weighed prospects for a long-awaited deal to end the US-Iran war that’s rattled global markets and stoked inflation.

title: The Bull and Bear Case for SpaceX
title_cn: SpaceX 的牛市和熊市案例
summary: SpaceX shares are hitting the public markets on Friday after the biggest IPO of all time. Founder ETFs Partner, Michael Monaghan, sees a three-in-one opportunity for investors while True North Advisors' Dhruv Maniktala says his firm is positioning as sellers at the current valuation. They debate what's next for the company on Bloomberg's Insight with Haslinda Amin. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Air India Crash Investigation Report: What Went Wrong?
title_cn: 印度航空坠机调查报告：出了什么问题？
summary: One year after India’s deadliest Boeing 787 crash, the final report is still delayed. Aviation Cargo Chairman, Vandana Singh, joins Bloomberg's Insight with Haslinda Amin to discuss investigation gaps, safety reforms, and what’s needed to restore public confidence in Indian aviation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Shares Indicated More Than 35% Higher in Shadow Trading
title_cn: 影子交易中 SpaceX 股价上涨逾 35%
summary: Shadow markets are pricing a blockbuster SpaceX stock debut, indicating a pop of at least 35% for Elon Musk’s rocket, satellite and AI company.

title: Stocks Rise, Oil Drops on Iran; SpaceX Set to List: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 伊朗股市上涨，油价下跌； SpaceX 即将上市：市场总结
summary: Stocks extended gains and oil fell after President Donald Trump said the US was nearing an agreement with Iran, raising expectations for a diplomatic end to the conflict that’s triggered price swings across financial markets for more than 100 days.

title: European and UK Stocks Poised to Jump as Oil Prices Slide
title_cn: 随着油价下滑，欧洲和英国股市有望上涨

title: ECB Ready to Hike Again in July If Necessary, Nagel Says
title_cn: 内格尔表示，如有必要，欧洲央行准备在 7 月再次加息
summary: The European Central Bank is prepared to raise interest rates for a second straight meeting next month if the shock from the war in the Middle East requires it, according to Governing Council member Joachim Nagel.

title: Oil Seen Rising Past $150 If Hormuz Still Closed
title_cn: 如果霍尔木兹海峡仍然关闭，油价有望突破 150 美元
summary: FGE NexantECA Chairman Emeritus Fereidun Fesharaki says he sees oil prices rising to $150 a barrel if the Strait of Hormuz is still effectively closed by August. On Bloomberg's Insight with Haslinda Amin, he also said oil could be closer to $200 a barrel by the end of the year. Fesharaki spoke June 11 on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Extends Decline After Trump Says Deal With Iran Is Close
title_cn: 特朗普称与伊朗达成协议后油价延续跌势
summary: Oil extended declines after President Donald Trump said a peace deal with Iran could be signed as soon as the weekend following US military strikes that cast doubt over progress to end the war.

title: Copper Prices Surge With Mining Stocks as Trump Flags Iran Deal
title_cn: 特朗普签署伊朗协议，铜价随矿业股飙升
summary: Copper rallied and mining equities surged after President Donald Trump claimed the US was on the cusp of ending the war with Iran that has clouded prospects for the global economy.

title: Singapore Brings Back 19th-Century Tech to Beat the Heat
title_cn: 新加坡带回 19 世纪的科技来消暑
summary:
Singapore is bringing back this 19th-century technology in some parts of the island to combat the heat.

It comes as a “super” El Niño is set to make it unusually hot in the country.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bassiri Tabrizi: Both Iran & US Will Claim MOU as a Win
title_cn: Bassiri Tabrizi：伊朗和美国都将签署谅解备忘录视为胜利
summary: Oil declined after President Donald Trump insisted a deal with Iran was close. Trump once again pulled back on a threat of more military strikes on the Islamic Republic. However Iran has not confirmed that a deal has been made. Aniseh Bassiri Tabrizi, Associate Fellow for MENA at Chatham House spoke to Bloomberg’s Abeer Abu Omar on Horizons Middle East and Africa on the likelihood of a deal announcement soon. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Danske Bank CEO Eyes First Acquisition Since Laundering Crisis
title_cn: 丹斯克银行首席执行官着眼于洗钱危机以来的首次收购
summary: Danske Bank A/S Chief Executive Officer Carsten Egeriis says it’s time to start thinking about acquisitions, potentially ending a nearly decade-long hiatus from major deals for Denmark’s largest lender.

title: Bayer Shares Hinge On Two Court Decisions After $60 Billion Rout
title_cn: 拜耳股价因 600 亿美元溃败后的两项法院判决而受到影响
summary: Bayer AG shares are facing a make-or-break few weeks, with two upcoming court developments key to stemming a more than $60 billion wipeout in market value since the German company’s ill-fated purchase of Monsanto eight years ago.

title: China Asks Big Banks to Curb Interbank Lending to Ease Cash Glut
title_cn: 中国要求大银行遏制银行间拆借以缓解现金过剩
summary: China told big state-owned banks to reduce their lending in the interbank market, according to people familiar with the matter, in an effort to prevent borrowing costs from drifting too far below the policy interest rate.

title: Australian Private Credit Firm Makes Bet on UK Loan Manager
title_cn: 澳大利亚私人信贷公司押注英国贷款经理
summary: Australian real estate private credit firm Qualitas Ltd. is expanding into Europe with the acquisition of a UK-based loan manager, leveraging on growing demand for commercial financing across the region.

title: Iran’s Oil Lifeline Faces ‘Biggest Test Yet’ as China Steps Back
title_cn: 随着中国的退出，伊朗的石油生命线面临“迄今为止最大的考验”
summary: Iranian oil shipments to China, a resilient trade that’s survived years of US sanctions to provide a crucial economic lifeline to Tehran, is coming under huge strain from waning demand and an American blockade.

title: How to Trade the SpaceX IPO in Asia's Locked-Out Markets
title_cn: 如何在亚洲封锁市场进行 SpaceX IPO 交易
summary: Investors across Asia have been largely shut out of the world’s largest-ever initial public offering, which has forced them to find creative ways to make bets on SpaceX’s $75 billion global spectacle.

title: ECB Hike 'Just Enough For Now,' Says Slovenian Central Bank Governor
title_cn: 斯洛文尼亚央行行长表示，欧洲央行加息“目前就足够了”
summary: The European Central Bank has hiked interest rates for the first time since September 2023 — becoming the first major central bank to react to the war in Iran. ECB Governing Council Member and Slovenia Central Bank Governor Primož Dolenc says the move is “just enough for now.” Dolenc spoke to Bloomberg's Oliver Crook in an exclusive interview just after the decision on Thursday. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ECB’s Dolenc Says Hike Was Needed as Data Sound Inflation Alarm
title_cn: 欧洲央行行长多伦茨表示需要加息，因为数据敲响了通胀警报
summary: European Central Bank Governing Council member Primoz Dolenc said Thursday’s interest-rate increase was necessary to keep prices in check while officials consider the broader implications of conflict in the Middle East.

title: Czech Central Bank Chief Sees Stronger Case for June Rate Hike
title_cn: 捷克央行行长认为六月加息的理由更有力
summary: Czech central bank Governor Ales Michl said he sees a stronger argument to raise interest rates in June to contain inflationary pressures.

title: Indonesia Says Export Agency Will Focus on Price, Not Trading
title_cn: 印度尼西亚表示出口机构将关注价格而不是贸易
summary: Indonesia’s commodity export agency will focus on monitoring the price of key raw-material exports instead of intervening in trade, according to a senior official, in an apparent effort to ease industry concerns over a radical natural-resource policy introduced last month.

title: SpaceX Makes History With Biggest-Ever IPO
title_cn: SpaceX 创造历史最大规模 IPO
summary: SpaceX raised $75 billion in its IPO, pricing 555.6 million shares at $135 each, sending it into the top ranks of the largest public companies and putting founder Elon Musk on the verge of becoming the world’s first trillionaire. Bloomberg Intelligence's Matthew Bloxham breaks down the situation and what to expect from SpaceX's first day of trading. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Alibaba Bids $1.5 Billion for China Grocer in Meituan Fight
title_cn: 阿里巴巴出价 15 亿美元收购中国杂货商 打响美团大战
summary: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. is offering $1.5 billion to buy Chinese grocery delivery firm Pupu, initiating a bidding war as part of a broader campaign to wrest market share from online commerce rival Meituan.

title: SpaceX Raises $2.2 Billion in Japan Slice of Record-Breaking IPO
title_cn: SpaceX 在日本筹集 22 亿美元创纪录的 IPO
summary: SpaceX raised $2.2 billion from Japanese investors, according to a regulatory filing on Friday, as part of the world’s largest-ever initial public offering.

title: RLRWLD CEO on Nvidia Partnership, DexBench
title_cn: RLRWLD 首席执行官谈 Nvidia 合作伙伴关系、DexBench
summary:
Junghee Ryu, Founder and CEO of South Korean robotics startup, RLWRLD, discusses the company's partnership with Nvidia to build a universal benchmark for evaluating how well robots use their hands to manipulate objects and complete tasks. The company is aiming to develop next-generation industry standards for humanoid robotics.
He speaks with Shery Ahn on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China's Regulatory Ceasefire Is Over, Gavekal Says
title_cn: 加韦卡尔表示，中国的监管停火已经结束
summary: Tilly Zhang, China technology and industrial policy analyst at Gavekal Dragonomics, says Beijing's latest regulatory actions differ from its 2021 campaign, with greater emphasis on law enforcement. The market regulator had summoned Alibaba, JD.com and other e-commerce players for allegedly misleading promotions, its latest warning against unchecked competition in the online arena. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Sparks Job Loss Worries in China, Call for Protection
title_cn: 人工智能引发中国失业担忧，呼吁保护
summary: China’s rapid adoption of AI in the workplace has prompted an unusually blunt call from a state-run newspaper. The Workers' Daily, the official paper of China’s umbrella trade union organization, called on regulators to protect labor rights as officials consider how to contain risks posed by the new technology. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chinese Robot Appliance Maker Dreame Tech Is Said to Consider IPO in Hong Kong
title_cn: 据称，中国机器人家电制造商梦想科技考虑在香港首次公开募股
summary: Dreame Technology, a Chinese maker of robotic vacuum cleaners and other smart home appliances, is considering a Hong Kong initial public offering as soon as next year, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Humanoid Robot Manufacturer EngineAI Is Said to File for Hong Kong IPO
title_cn: 人形机器人制造商EngineAI据称将申请香港IPO
summary: Chinese robotics startup EngineAI has filed confidentially for a Hong Kong initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter, joining a legion of companies in the sector seeking funding.

title: MediaTek’s Rally Signals Shift From Laggard to AI Contender
title_cn: 联发科的反弹信号从落后者转变为人工智能竞争者
summary: MediaTek Inc. shares are poised for their best quarter on record, as investors bet a shift into artificial intelligence chips can help it shed the overhang of its struggling older-tech business.

title: ChatGPT Pushed Back on LA Fire Suspect’s Vision of Burning City
title_cn: ChatGPT 驳斥了洛杉矶火灾嫌疑人对燃烧城市的想象
summary: The man accused of setting the massive Palisades Fire in Los Angeles repeatedly asked ChatGPT to create images of a city engulfed in flames and floods, and cursed at OpenAI’s chatbot when it told him the scenery he envisioned was too violent, jurors at his trial were told Thursday.

title: Scaffolding Company’s Data-Center Pivot Cuts Into Margins
title_cn: 脚手架公司的数据中心支点削减了利润
summary: Brand Industrial Services Inc., a scaffolding and industrial services company that does business as BrandSafway, reported sharply lower first-quarter earnings as higher costs and spending on its push into data center construction weighed on results, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: SpaceX Prices IPO Shares in Biggest Debut Ever | The Close 6/11/2026
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股定价史上最大规模收盘价 2026 年 6 月 11 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are PIMCO Managing Director & Global Economic Advisor Richard Clarida, Gabelli Funds Portfolio Manager John Belton, ServiceNow President of Global Customer Operations Paul Fipps, J.P. Morgan Private Bank Head of Alternative Investment Strategy Sitara Sundar, SoFi Chief Market Strategist Liz Thomas, D.A. Davison Technology Research Head Gil Luria, Wedbush Securities Technology Research Global Head Dan Ives, ValueEdge Advisors Chair Nell Minow, & FTSE Russell Director of Product Management Catherine Yoshimoto. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Concerns Raised Over Corporate Governance in SpaceX's Historic IPO
title_cn: SpaceX 历史性 IPO 引发对公司治理的担忧
summary: Nell Minow, Chair of Value Edge Advisors and Former President of ISS, advised caution regarding SpaceX's IPO, which was priced at $135 per share in the largest debut ever. She highlighted significant corporate governance issues being raised by pension managers and investors. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CME Announces Plans to Offer 24/7 WTI Oil and Gold Contracts
title_cn: CME 宣布计划提供 24/7 WTI 石油和黄金合约
summary: The Chicago Mercantile Group announced plans to offer 24-hour, seven-days-a-week trading in new, smaller crude oil futures and its existing gold contract, the exchange said Thursday.

title: Adobe’s CFO Departs While Company Also Searches for New CEO
title_cn: Adobe 首席财务官离职，同时公司也在寻找新首席执行官
summary: Adobe Inc. said its chief financial officer would depart, leaving the company without a top tier of veteran leadership after Chief Executive Officer Shantanu Narayen announced in March that he would step aside.

title: SpaceX IPO Priced at $135 Amid Massive Oversubscription, Sparking Market Anticipation
title_cn: SpaceX IPO定价135美元 超额认购引发市场期待
summary: SpaceX has made history with the largest IPO ever, pricing shares at $135 each and raising $75 billion. Dan Ives, Global Head of Technology Research at Wedbush Securities, discussed the overwhelming demand for the offering, which Bloomberg reports is four times oversubscribed, including $100 billion in retail orders and significant institutional interest such as a $5 billion order from BlackRock. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: PIMCO’s Richard Clarida: AI Now a Major Economic Driver
title_cn: PIMCO 的 Richard Clarida：人工智能现在是主要的经济驱动力
summary: Richard Clarida, Managing Director and Global Economic Adviser at PIMCO and Former Vice Chair of the Federal Reserve Board of Governors, discussed the significant impact of artificial intelligence (AI) on the economy and markets over the next five years. He emphasized AI as a potential disinflationary force due to increased productivity and possible wage compression, while also noting the financing risks associated with AI investments. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX IPO Raises $75 Billion in Biggest Debut of All Time
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股 (IPO) 融资 750 亿美元，创史上最大规模首次公开募股
summary: SpaceX has made history with the biggest-ever IPO, sending it into the top ranks of the largest public companies and putting founder Elon Musk on the verge of becoming the world’s first trillionaire.

title: The Push for a Public Wealth Fund to Distribute AI Gains
title_cn: 推动公共财富基金分配人工智能收益
summary: Lawmakers and tech firms are suggesting new ways to ensure the public gets a piece of the AI boom

title: SpaceX IPO Multiple Times Oversubscribed | Bloomberg Tech 6/10/2026
title_cn: SpaceX IPO多次超额认购 |彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 10 日
summary:
Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss Wall Street’s enthusiasm for SpaceX as the company’s IPO approaches. Plus, Google backstops Anthropic data centers as Silicon Valley races to build AI infrastructure with ever more intertwined deals. And, a new dashboard shows the real-time impact of AI on the labor market.

*This video has been edited to fix a misspelling in a graphic (Source: Bloomberg)

title: New Tracker Traces AI’s Real-Time Impact on Work
title_cn: 新追踪器追踪人工智能对工作的实时影响
summary:
Nela Richardson, Chief Economist at ADP and a Bloomberg contributor, says employers need to decide whether AI is going to be a tool for automating roles away or augmenting tasks to create new value. She discusses the new Canaries Dashboard, launched by ADP and the Stanford Digital Economy Lab, to provide real-time indications of how AI is reshaping different occupations based on labor market data. Richardson joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.”

*This video has been edited to fix a misspelling in a graphic (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Holder Ark Sees $300 Billion Win on Orbital Data Centers
title_cn: SpaceX Holder Ark 赢得轨道数据中心 3000 亿美元
summary: Ark Investment Management’s Brett Winton said SpaceX could generate $300 billion in annual revenue by deploying tens of gigawatts of orbital data center capacity by the late 2020s at the current rental rates.

title: Gopuff Chose xAI For Cost and Quality, Says Co-CEO
title_cn: 联合首席执行官表示 Gopuff 选择 xAI 是为了成本和质量
summary: As SpaceXAI heads toward its IPO, investors are betting on more than rockets and chatbots: the company says enterprise AI represents a $26 trillion opportunity. But can Grok actually win corporate customers? One of the few companies putting it to work is Gopuff, which built its new AI shopping assistant on xAI's models. Gopuff co-CEO Rafael Ilishayev joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Investors Bet It Can Turn Sci-Fi Into Reality
title_cn: SpaceX 投资者押注它可以将科幻变成现实
summary: Much of SpaceX's growth forecast hinges on ideas that seem straight out of science fiction, but backers of Elon Musk say he's pulled off the unbelievable before. Brett Winton, chief futurist at ARK Invest, one of the most prominent institutional supporters of Musk's firms, joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Software Stock Reversal Has Traders Bracing for More Pain Ahead
title_cn: 软件股反转让交易者做好迎接未来更多痛苦的准备
summary: A recent rally in software stocks is proving to be short-lived, and investors are bracing for more selling as fears linger about artificial intelligence disruption.

title: SpaceX IPO Draws More Than $70B in Retail Orders | Bloomberg Tech 6/11/2026
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股吸引了超过 70B 美元的零售订单彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 11 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss SpaceX gearing up to finalize its IPO pricing today. This as its offering attracts more than $70 billion in orders from retail investors. Plus, Oracle is under pressure after the company reported higher quarterly capital expenses than expected, raising investor concerns about the profitability of the AI infrastructure business. And, a conversation with 776 Founder and Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian from SuperReturn in Berlin. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What to Know as the Swiss Prepare to Vote on a 10 Million Population Cap
title_cn: 瑞士准备就 1000 万人口上限进行投票时需要了解什么
summary: The growing prominence of far-right political parties in Europe is pressuring governments to introduce stricter controls on immigration. Switzerland is set to vote on a proposal that would take things to the next level: a 10 million cap on its population.

title: Russia’s Regional Leaders Scramble to Quash Fuel Crunch Concerns
title_cn: 俄罗斯地区领导人争先恐后地消除对燃料紧缩的担忧
summary: Russia’s regional authorities are scrambling to dispel concerns about a gasoline crunch in the wake of Ukrainian strikes on oil infrastructure that sparked reports of shortages at some filling stations.

title: Gary Lineker: The World Cup, Trump and FIFA
title_cn: 加里·莱因克尔：世界杯、特朗普和国际足联
summary: For decades, Gary Lineker anchored live sporting events for the BBC. Now he’s a podcaster. In this conversation, he talks about his new Netflix show and his hopes for an England World Cup win. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump, Modi Look to Repair Ties in Shadow of New US Strikes
title_cn: 特朗普和莫迪希望在美国新一轮打击的阴影下修复关系
summary: A possible meeting next week between Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi and US President Donald Trump offers a chance to reset ties following a year of strained relations over tariffs, Pakistan, and now, the Iran war.

title: Malaysia’s ‘Free-for-All’ Election Season Set For July Open
title_cn: 马来西亚“混战”选举季将于七月开幕
summary: The loose coalitions that rule Malaysia are starting to fray as the next election season heats up, opening up a multifront challenge for Anwar Ibrahim to maintain his premiership.

title: Ukraine’s AI Drones Have Given Kyiv a Fresh Edge on Battlefield
title_cn: 乌克兰的人工智能无人机为基辅战场带来了新的优势
summary: Waves of AI-guided drones are hammering Russian supply lines in occupied Ukraine as Kyiv seeks to capitalize on its latest advances in technology and tactics.

title: Carney’s Middle Powers Race to Thwart US-China Dominance of AI
title_cn: 卡尼的中等强国竞相阻止中美在人工智能领域的主导地位
summary: A survey of government AI strategies in three continents shows a determination not to allow Washington and Beijing to dictate the future alone.

title: Bad Bunny’s Sold-Out Shows Illuminate Spain’s New Lifeline: Immigrants
title_cn: 《坏兔子》售空的演出照亮了西班牙的新生命线：移民
summary: In the past three years, the country has welcomed more than 3 million arrivals, many from Latin America. They’ve helped transform Spain into the fastest-expanding major economy in the euro zone.

title: Trump Insists Iran Deal Is Close After Scrapping New Strikes
title_cn: 特朗普坚称伊朗协议在取消新的打击后即将达成
summary: President Donald Trump pulled back threatened military strikes against Iran, a stark reversal that came just hours after he vowed to hit the Islamic Republic “VERY HARD” and threatened to seize its oil infrastructure.

title: China Escalates Feud With Philippines by Banning Defense Chief
title_cn: 中国禁止国防部长加剧与菲律宾的不和
summary: China imposed sanctions on Philippine Defense Secretary Gilberto Teodoro, accusing him of making remarks that damaged bilateral ties and raising tensions in a relationship already strained by territorial disputes.

title: South Korea’s Ex-Leader Convicted Over Drones Sent to Pyongyang
title_cn: 韩国前领导人因向平壤运送无人机而被定罪
summary: A Seoul court found former South Korean President Yoon Suk Yeol guilty of sending drones to Pyongyang to provoke a military confrontation with North Korea meant to create grounds for declaring martial law in 2024.

title: Taiwan Dumpling Alliance Fades Under China Economic Squeeze
title_cn: 台湾饺子联盟在中国经济压力下衰落
summary: The “Dumpling Alliance” burst to life during Covid, a nifty description for an informal collective of Eastern European states supporting Taiwan. Just a few years later, it’s hard to find a mention of it anywhere.

title: China Confronts G7 During Macron’s Call by Defending Free Trade
title_cn: 马克龙呼吁中国捍卫自由贸易对抗七国集团
summary: Chinese Vice Premier Zhang Guoqing made a case for the benefits of free trade during a video call Thursday with Group of Seven countries, as Beijing faces questions over its role in contributing to global economic imbalances.

title: South Korean Leader’s Support Slides to Six-Month Low After Vote
title_cn: 投票后韩国领导人的支持率跌至六个月低点
summary: The support rate for South Korean President Lee Jae Myung fell to a six-month low despite his party’s recent victories in local elections, as voters express frustration over ballot shortages reported at dozens of polling stations.

title: US Sees $13.7 Billion Bill to Boost F-35 Readiness, GAO Says
title_cn: 美国政府问责局表示，美国将拨款 137 亿美元加强 F-35 战备状态
summary: The Air Force, Navy and Marine Corps need to spend an additional $13.7 billion through 2031 to boost declining readiness rates of the F-35 jet, the world’s biggest weapons program, the Pentagon told congressional auditors.

title: Three Teens Expose Exam Flaws That Spark Modi Political Showdown
title_cn: 三名青少年揭露考试缺陷，引发莫迪政治摊牌
summary: It took three Indian teenagers — a hacker, a researcher and a student unhappy with his exam scores — to expose a series of failures in India’s education system that have created a major headache for Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s government.

title: Trump, Elon Musk Friendship More Professional
title_cn: 特朗普与埃隆·马斯克的友谊更加专业
summary: On this week’s "The Debrief with Mario Parker," Mario breaks down the relationship between President Trump and Elon Musk as the President stated earlier this month that Musk is “a friend of mine again.” He talks about SpaceX launching its IPO Friday and the various members of the Trump Administration who stand to gain from it, & if Musk will spend any money backing candidates during the midterm elections. Mario speaks with Kailey Leinz on the late edition of Bloomberg’s “Balance of Power.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Taps Jay Clayton to Lead Top Intel Office | Balance of Power: Late Edition 06/11/2026
title_cn: 特朗普任命杰伊·克莱顿 (Jay Clayton) 领导英特尔高级办公室权力平衡：最新版 06/11/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Rep. Glenn Ivey (D-MD), says he's skeptical of President Trump's claimed Iran deal, arguing the president has "painted us into a corner." David Hale, Former US ambassador to Pakistan and Lebanon, and Dana Stroul, former Deputy Assistant Secretary of Defense for the Middle East, discuss President Trump’s announcement of a potential deal with Iran.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US-Iran Deal Slowed By Web of Go-Betweens Facilitating Talks
title_cn: 美伊协议因中间人网络促进谈判而放缓
summary: President Donald Trump has repeatedly said the US and Iran are on the cusp of a deal to end their conflict. The reality has proven more elusive — in part because of the nature of the negotiations themselves.

title: US Suspends Los Angeles Homeless Funding Alleging ‘Clear’ Fraud
title_cn: 美国暂停对洛杉矶无家可归者的资助，指控“明显”欺诈
summary: The US Department of Housing and Urban Development has suspended federal funding for a leading homeless services agency in Los Angeles, alleging a “clear pattern of fraud” in a city with more than 40,000 people sleeping in tents, cars and other temporary shelter.

title: Hale, Stroul Weigh Trump’s Claims of Iran Deal
title_cn: 黑尔和斯特劳尔权衡特朗普对伊朗协议的主张
summary: David Hale, Former US ambassador to Pakistan and Lebanon, and Dana Stroul, former Deputy Assistant Secretary of Defense for the Middle East, discuss President Trump’s announcement of a potential deal with Iran, including questions over what has been agreed to, whether Iran’s leadership is aligned, and how the US and Israel may approach the next phase of negotiations. They speak with Kailey Leinz on the late edition of Bloomberg’s "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rep. Ivey: Trump 'Painted Us Into a Corner' on Iran
title_cn: 众议员艾维：特朗普在伊朗问题上“把我们逼到了墙角”
summary: Rep. Glenn Ivey, a Maryland Democrat and member of the House Appropriations and Ethics Committees, says he's skeptical of President Trump's claimed Iran deal, arguing the president has "painted us into a corner." He also says he wants to learn more about Jay Clayton's nomination as Director of National Intelligence, and says "big fights" over underlying FISA issues remain unresolved. He speaks with Kailey Leinz on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Defense Chief Quits With Attack on Starmer Over Spending
title_cn: 英国防长辞职，攻击斯塔默开支过多
summary: Defense Secretary John Healey quit the UK government after a months-long spending row with the Treasury came to a head, in a move that dramatically dents Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s authority just as rivals are lining up to challenge for his job.

title: US Sanctions Cuba’s State Oil Firm in Blow to Private Fuel Deal
title_cn: 美国制裁古巴国有石油公司，打击私人燃料交易
summary: The US sanctioned Cuba’s state oil and gas company, potentially derailing a deal to send fuel to the communist-run island’s private sector in the middle of a dire energy crisis.

title: Trump Calls of Iran Strike, SpaceX Set to IPO | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 6/11/2026
title_cn: 特朗普呼吁对伊朗实施打击，SpaceX 准备首次公开募股彭博商业周刊日报 6/11/2026
summary: On today's episode, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec speak with Michelle Jamrisko, Bloomberg News White House & National Security Editor on Trump's decision to not strike Iran. They also spoke to Danielle DiMartino Booth, CEO and Chief Strategist for QI Research on today's inflation data. And, they caught up on the latest from the World Cup and Knicks win with Randall Williams, Bloomberg News Senior Reporter, and Vanessa Perdomo Maglione, Bloomberg News Sports Business Reporter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Threatens DC Takeover If Janeese Lewis George Wins Primary
title_cn: 特朗普威胁称，如果珍尼斯·刘易斯·乔治赢得初选，将接管华盛顿特区
summary: President Donald Trump threatened a federal government takeover of Washington, DC, if self-described democratic socialist Janeese Lewis George wins the city’s Democratic mayoral primary.

title: Trump Taps Wall Street Top Cop Clayton as Intelligence Chief
title_cn: 特朗普任命华尔街顶级警察克莱顿为情报总监
summary: President Donald Trump said he is nominating Jay Clayton to be the next director of national intelligence, following backlash over his selection of housing regulator Bill Pulte to serve in the role on an acting basis.

title: Trump Opens Protected Pacific Waters to Commercial Fishing
title_cn: 特朗普向商业捕鱼开放太平洋受保护水域
summary: President Donald Trump on Thursday opened protected Pacific Ocean waters to commercial fishing, lifting restrictions that barred the activity within three marine national monuments.
